when green flag clicked
go to x: (12) y: (147)
point in direction (180)
turn left (pick random (-30) to (30)) degrees
forever 
move (12) steps
if on edge, bounce
end

when green flag clicked
forever 
if <touching (Jugador 1 v) ?> then
point in direction (0)
turn left (pick random (1) to (10)) degrees
end
if <touching (jugador 2 v) ?> then
point in direction (0)
turn right (pick random (1) to (10)) degrees
end
end

when green flag clicked
forever 
if <touching color [#001cff] ?> then
wait (0.5) seconds
go to x: (12) y: (147)
change [Jugador 2 v] by (1)
end
end

when green flag clicked
forever 
if <touching color [#ff3b3b] ?> then
wait (0.5) seconds
go to x: (12) y: (147)
change [Jugador 1 v] by (1)
end
end

when green flag clicked
set [Jugador 1 v] to (0)
